Meaning.Vi: Tên riêng: George (thường dùng cho nam)
Meaning.En: A male given name, notably borne by several British monarchs, including King George I–VI.
Meaning.Example: King George III ruled Great Britain during the American Revolutionary War.

Situation.Vi: Dùng để chỉ các vị vua Anh mang tên George, hoặc người đàn ông có tên George.
Situation.En: Used to refer to British monarchs named George or men named George in historical or contemporary contexts.
